note.zh: 以 GPT-5.5 Pro（开启 Extended Pro）生成；本页为修复版（仅改 1 行）。问题：14 张贴图排成 8×2 图集、第二行只画了 6 格，UV 按左上原点计算却未设 flipY=false，两行贴图上下互换采样。修复前：草地顶面显示成黑曜石（地面全黑），树叶、沙子采到未绘制的空格（大片纯黑），放置方块的贴图互相串行、颜色诡异似反色。原因：CanvasTexture 默认 flipY=true，与自上而下的图集布局不匹配。加上 flipY=false 后地形与方块颜色全部正常。
note.en: Generated with GPT-5.5 Pro (Extended Pro enabled); fixed build (1 line changed). Bug: 14 tiles in an 8x2 atlas with only 6 slots drawn in row two, UVs computed from a top-left origin without flipY=false, so the two rows swapped on sampling. Before the fix: grass tops rendered as obsidian (black ground), leaves and sand hit undrawn slots (large black patches), and placed blocks wore each other's textures with inverted-looking colors. Cause: CanvasTexture defaults to flipY=true, mismatching the top-down atlas layout. With flipY=false everything renders correctly.

note.zh: 在 ChatGPT 网页版以 GPT-5.5 Pro（开启 Extended Pro）一次生成。
note.en: Generated in one shot in the ChatGPT web app on GPT-5.5 Pro (Extended Pro enabled).

note.zh: 在 ChatGPT 网页版以 GPT-5.5 Pro（开启 Extended Pro）一次生成；本页为修复版（仅改 1 行）。问题：发条与游丝用 createSpiralTube 构建（760 行），管线段数写成 Math.max(96, turns * 38)，turns 为 5.8 / 6.4 时算出 220.4 / 243.2 的小数段数。修复前：TubeGeometry 末尾会以该段数作下标取 Frenet 帧 frames.normals[220.4]，得到 undefined 后读取 .x 抛 TypeError，初始化中断，页面卡在「Assembling jeweled movement...」加载遮罩永不消失。原因：模型把管线段数当连续值传入，未取整。改为 Math.round(turns * 38) 后段数为整数，场景正常加载、遮罩按时隐藏。
note.en: Generated in one shot in the ChatGPT web app on GPT-5.5 Pro (Extended Pro enabled); fixed build (1 line changed). Bug: the mainspring and hairspring are built via createSpiralTube (line 760) with the tube segment count written as Math.max(96, turns * 38), so turns of 5.8 / 6.4 yield fractional counts 220.4 / 243.2. Before the fix: TubeGeometry's trailing generateSegment indexes the Frenet-frame arrays with that count (frames.normals[220.4]), gets undefined and reads .x, throwing a TypeError that aborts init and leaves the page stuck on the 'Assembling jeweled movement...' loading overlay forever. Cause: the model passed the tube segment count as a continuous value without rounding. Changing it to Math.round(turns * 38) makes the count an integer, so the scene loads and the overlay hides on schedule.
